narrative:
Coldwater West (precinct in Mercer County) has 842 registered voters, with 38.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 54.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 47.6 percentage points.
